title: Drip Irrigation
meaning: Drip irrigation is a modern irrigation method where water is supplied directly to the roots of plants drop by drop.
description: Drip irrigation supplies water directly to plant roots using pipes and emitters.
advantages: Saves water, improves crop growth and reduces weed growth.

title: Sprinkler Irrigation
meaning: Sprinkler irrigation is a method where water is sprayed over crops like natural rainfall.
description: Sprinklers distribute water uniformly like rainfall over crops.
advantages: Uniform water distribution and suitable for uneven lands.

title: Flood Irrigation
meaning: Flood irrigation is a traditional irrigation method where fields are flooded with water.
description: Flood irrigation allows water to flow freely across agricultural land.
advantages: Simple method and low installation cost.

title: Canal Irrigation
meaning: Canal irrigation uses canals to supply river water to agricultural fields.
description: Canals carry river water to agricultural lands for irrigation.

title: Surface Irrigation
meaning: Surface irrigation is a method where water flows naturally across the soil surface.
description: Water flows naturally across the soil surface to irrigate crops.

title: Subsurface Irrigation
meaning: Subsurface irrigation supplies water below the soil surface directly to roots.
description: Water is supplied below the soil surface directly to roots.

title: Center Pivot Irrigation
meaning: Center pivot irrigation uses rotating sprinklers to irrigate large circular fields.
description: A rotating sprinkler system irrigates crops in circular patterns.

title: Manual Irrigation
meaning: Manual irrigation is the traditional method of supplying water manually using buckets and pipes.
description: Water is manually supplied using buckets, pipes or watering cans.
advantages: Simple and suitable for small farms.

title: Basin Irrigation
meaning: Basin irrigation is a method where water is supplied in small basins around plants.
description: Basin irrigation involves filling basins around plants with water.

title: Furrow Irrigation
meaning: Furrow irrigation supplies water through furrows between crop rows.
description: Water flows through furrows between crop rows.
